theme_strategy.description: Dark theme only for MVP to establish a premium, Sotheby's-like atmosphere. The UI acts as a calm, confident backdrop where the collectibles (photography) are the absolute heroes.

rules: Never use full-screen purple or loud neon gradients.
Primary blue establishes trust and should be used for primary actions.
Accent gold is for premium tiers, rare item indicators, and high-confidence AI valuations. Use sparingly.
Backgrounds are deep near-black (#0B0F14), cards/surfaces are #151B23. Ensure proper contrast.

headings.usage: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for H1-H3 to convey modern sophistication.

body.usage: Clean, highly legible sans-serif for metadata, descriptions, and UI text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Whitespace is a feature. Generous margins (p-8 to p-16) to create a gallery-like experience.

grid.marketplace: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl (10-14px) for cards and images. Soft, not overly bubbly.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-[#F8FAFC] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-blue-700 active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#151B23] border border-[#2A3441] text-[#F8FAFC] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-[#2A3441]
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0B0F14] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 hover:brightness-110
buttons.rules: No oversized buttons. Keep padding elegant and balanced.

cards.collectible_card: bg-[#151B23] border border-[#2A3441] rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#94A3B8] transition-colors duration-250. Image must fill the top 70% of the card. Text area is minimal (Title, Price, Condition).
cards.valuation_card: Surface background, gold accent border for high confidence. Features a subtle inner glow using box-shadow.
cards.upload_dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-[#2A3441] rounded-xl bg-[#0B0F14] hover:bg-[#151B23] transition-colors p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer.

inputs.text: bg-[#0B0F14] border border-[#2A3441] rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-[#F8FAFC] placeholder-[#94A3B8] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2563EB] focus:border-[#2563EB] transition-all
inputs.select: Same as text input, typically paired with a Lucide React ChevronDown icon.

badges.condition: bg-[#151B23] border border-[#2A3441] text-[#F8FAFC] text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full
badges.confidence: bg-[#D4AF37]/10 text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37]/30 text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1.5

navigation.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0B0F14]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#2A3441]. Minimal links, refined layout. NO transparent backgrounds without blur.

motion.philosophy: Invisible and subtle. Feels natural, not flashy.

media.rules: Photography is the hero. Images must be large, high quality, and fill the container. Apply a subtle black gradient overlay at the bottom of hero images if text is placed over them.

iconography.style: Thin, minimal, stroke-width 1.5. No heavy or filled icons unless indicating active state.
iconography.usage: Use sparingly. Let typography and spacing do the heavy lifting.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over surface backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards. #F8FAFC on #151B23 is highly accessible.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus state (e.g., ring-2 ring-[#2563EB] ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#0B0F14]).
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for all transitions.

views_and_layouts.landing_page: Hero section with large centered typography and massive featured image. Bento grid for 'How it works'. Horizontal scrolling row for featured items.
views_and_layouts.upload_flow: Centered, narrow max-width container (max-w-2xl). Step indicators. Large drag-and-drop zone. Soft glowing borders during AI analysis.
views_and_layouts.item_detail: Split layout: 60% left side dedicated purely to a massive, edge-to-edge photo gallery. 40% right side sticky column for title, valuation, provenance, and Buy CTA.
views_and_layouts.marketplace: Sidebar layout. 250px left sidebar for filters (Category, Price, Condition). Right side auto-fill grid of large item cards.
views_and_layouts.dashboard: Clean table lists for My Listings, soft metric cards for sales analytics. Empty states must use an elegant icon and muted text, avoiding visual clutter.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize UI layout and exact colors specified in this guideline.
Ensure dark mode is set via Tailwind base layer (body background #0B0F14, text #F8FAFC).
Do NOT introduce external fonts other than Space Grotesk and Inter.
Implement component structures utilizing pure Tailwind over complex headless wrappers unless strictly necessary.
Focus heavily on the 'Upload & Appraise' flow as the core interactive moment—make the AI valuation step feel premium and magical but grounded.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered text for body paragraphs; use it only for hero headlines or specific badges.
Ensure depth through layered z-indexes and subtle borders (#2A3441), rather than heavy shadows.
Use backdrop-blur-xl for sticky headers or overlapping UI elements to create glassmorphism subtly. Never leave header backgrounds transparent.
Avoid the 'AI Slop' aesthetic: no purple gradients, no robot emojis. Use lucide-react icons with stroke-width 1.5.
All components must be accessible and responsive (mobile-first).
